message:
feat: Add JSON, REGEXP functions and scalar subqueries

- Add JSON functions: JSON_EXTRACT, JSON_OBJECT, JSON_ARRAY, JSON_KEYS,
  JSON_LENGTH, JSON_TYPE, JSON_VALID with full path support
- Add REGEXP functions: REGEXP_MATCHES (with case-insensitive flag),
  REGEXP_REPLACE, REGEXP_EXTRACT, REGEXP_COUNT, REGEXP_SPLIT
- Add scalar subquery support in SELECT list for non-correlated subqueries
  e.g., SELECT id, (SELECT MAX(salary) FROM employees) AS max_sal FROM dept
- Add 4th argument support to SelectExpr for JSON_OBJECT with 4 args
- Add json_length/json_valid that count JSON object keys and array elements

Test results: 225 passed, 7 failed, 3 skipped (96% passing)
Remaining: PIVOT/UNPIVOT, ROLLUP/CUBE, WITH RECURSIVE, BM25, correlated subqueries
